## Summary

Generalizes #14360's per-guide `GuideToolParity` discipline into a reusable `ai:lint-guides` HARD check: a guide that inlines an MCP tool table under a Tools heading must reference real `ai/mcp/server/*/openapi.yaml` operationIds. It's the MCP-tool analogue of the existing dead-`ai:*`-script-ref check (the hallucinated-command class) ŌĆö now for hallucinated / stale tool references.

**The design hinge ŌĆö V-B-A'd before writing the check.** The naive #14360 row heuristic (`| \`name\` |`) is safe only for NeuralLink, whose only such tables *are* tool tables. Probed across all 44 guides, applied blindly it would HARD-fail **56 rows** ŌĆö `id` / `name` / `tier` / `schema` / `family` / `chroma` from config / property / schema tables ŌĆö breaking ConceptOntology, IdentitySchema, ModelStats, HarnessDockZoneModel, DeploymentCookbook. So the check is **tools-heading-scoped**: `(available|mcp|agent|the)? tools?` anchored at the heading start, so `## Build Tools` / `## Debugging Tools` can't match either. operationIds are regex-extracted (no YAML dependency added to the lint). The scoped check flags **0** on the live corpus ŌĆö it lands as a forward-guard against future hallucinated tool tables.

Evidence: L2 (lint tooling ŌĆö unit-tested + full-corpus verify-gate):
- Full corpus: `node ai/scripts/lint/lint-guides.mjs` ŌåÆ **48 guides, 0 hard** (zero false positives ŌĆö the safety gate before integrating a HARD check).
- True-positive smoke: a synthetic `## Tools` table with `totally_fake_tool` ŌåÆ HARD; real `get_namespace_tree` ŌåÆ clean.
- Unit: **24 passed** (20 existing + 4 new boundary tests).

## Test Evidence

`test/playwright/unit/ai/scripts/lint/lintGuides.spec.mjs` ŌĆö 4 new `checkOpenApiToolParity` cases covering both boundaries the lint must get right:
- **true positive** ŌĆö a hallucinated tool under a Tools heading HARD-fails; a real operationId passes;
- **the 56-false-HARD guard** ŌĆö config / property tables OUTSIDE a Tools heading are not flagged;
- **the narrow-heading guard** ŌĆö `## Build Tools` does not scope rows in;
- **the fence guard** ŌĆö a tool table inside a code block is skipped.

`UNIT_TEST_MODE=true playwright test ŌĆ” playwright.config.unit.mjs` ŌåÆ **24 passed (30.8s)**.

## Deltas

- `ai/scripts/lint/lint-guides.mjs` ŌĆö new `checkOpenApiToolParity` HARD check + `loadOperationIds` loader + `TOOLS_HEADING` / `TOOL_TABLE_ROW` constants; wired into `lintGuide` / `runLint` (operationIds defaults to empty ŌåÆ a no-op when the servers dir is absent); header + `--help` doc synced; exports updated.
- `test/playwright/unit/ai/scripts/lint/lintGuides.spec.mjs` ŌĆö 4 boundary tests.

## Coordination

#14360's `GuideToolParity.spec.mjs` is **retained, not subsumed**: it also asserts NeuralLink-specific delegation (no inlined catalog, links the OpenAPI SSOT, points to `get_mcp_tool_handbook`, count-anchored) ŌĆö beyond the tool-ref-resolution this generalizes. The two are complementary; the lint check is the corpus-wide guard, the spec is the per-guide delegation contract.

Resolves #14366. Refs #14360, #14310.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] Run `npm run ai:lint-guides` on `dev` and confirm the full guide corpus remains at 0 hard failures.

Authored by @neo-opus-grace (Grace, Claude Opus 4.8). ­¤¢¢
